description: A worker noticed a scaffolding plank on the 4th floor (approx. 12m) was unsecured at one end and could shift underfoot. No one was injured but a colleague nearly stepped on the unsecured end.

hazard_title: Solvent-based adhesive used in enclosed space
description: Workers are applying solvent-based contact adhesive in a poorly ventilated basement area. Strong fumes are present and workers are reporting headaches. The chemical used has a high VOC content and is flammable.

Concrete cutting work with a petrol-powered disc cutter is being performed daily on-site. Noise measurements near the operator reach 105 dB(A). Workers in adjacent areas are also exposed without adequate protection.

hazard_title: Wet concrete spillage on access walkway
description: A small amount of wet concrete was spilled on a shared pedestrian walkway between two work zones. The area has not been marked or cleaned up. A worker slipped but did not fall.

hazard_title: Workers not wearing high-visibility vests in traffic zone
description: Two subcontractor workers were observed working near an active vehicle access road without wearing high-visibility vests. The area has designated PPE requirements. No vehicle came close during the observation.

hazard_title: Unguarded rotating shaft on concrete mixer
description: The rotating drive shaft on a portable concrete mixer has had its guard removed and not replaced. Workers pass within arm's reach of the exposed rotating shaft during normal work activities.

hazard_title: Manual lifting of heavy precast panels
description: Workers are manually attempting to position 80kg precast concrete panels due to the crane being unavailable. A worker strained their lower back but continued working. No mechanical lifting aid was used.
